attributes.title: Total ERRORs (Deep Dive)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Total ERRORs", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "Labels", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10}, {"from": 10, "to": 100}, {"from": 100, "to": 1000000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgColor": false, "labelColor": true, "subText": "ERROR-level events", "fontSize": 48}}}}

attributes.title: Errors with Stack Traces (Deep Dive)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Errors with Stack Traces", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "Labels", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10}, {"from": 10, "to": 100}, {"from": 100, "to": 1000000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgColor": false, "labelColor": true, "subText": "With Java stack traces", "fontSize": 48}}}}

attributes.title: Errors by Pod (Deep Dive)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Errors by Pod", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "pod.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": true, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true, "labels": {"show": true, "values": true, "last_level": true, "truncate": 100}}}

attributes.title: Error Timeline (Deep Dive)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Error Timeline", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "logger.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 8, "otherBucket": true, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Count"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {"show": false}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.title: Top Error Loggers (Deep Dive)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Top Error Loggers", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "logger.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 25, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "error_class.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 5, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": true, "missingBucketLabel": "(no exception)"}}], "params": {"perPage": 15, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showToolbar": true, "showTotal": true, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}

attributes.title: Error Signatures (Deep Dive)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Error Signatures", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "error_class.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": true, "missingBucketLabel": "(no exception)"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "log_signature.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"perPage": 15, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showToolbar": true, "showTotal": true, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}

attributes.title: Error Log Detail (Full Messages)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Error Log Detail", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "logger.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 25, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "log_message.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "pod.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"perPage": 20, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showToolbar": true, "showTotal": true, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}

attributes.title: Stack Trace Detail (Deep Dive)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Stack Trace Detail", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "error_class.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 15, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": true, "missingBucketLabel": "(no class)"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "logger.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 5, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "log_signature.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 5, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"perPage": 15, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showToolbar": true, "showTotal": true, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}

attributes.title: AEM Error Deep Dive
attributes.description: Root-cause analysis for ERROR-level events — see exactly which loggers throw errors, the full error messages, which pods are affected, and stack trace details. Use the tables to pinpoint what is broken and where.
